Second paragraph with more text so trafilatura has enough content to extract reliably for the minimum character threshold used by the application. The threshold is around two hundred characters of plain text after HTML stripping.

Third paragraph continues the theme of readable article content for local read-later ingestion tests. We want deterministic HTML that exercises both trafilatura and readability fallback paths when needed.
